differential_diagnoses: Necrotizing fasciitis or deep soft tissue infection
Vasculitis (e.g., polyarteritis nodosa or ANCA-associated vasculitis)
next_steps: Perform punch biopsy of the advancing edge of an ulcer for histopathology and tissue culture
Consult dermatology and rheumatology specialists immediately
Initiate high-dose systemic glucocorticoid therapy (e.g., prednisone or methylprednisolone)
Discontinue unnecessary broad-spectrum antibiotics to rule out drug-induced skin reactions
Perform colonoscopy and/or capsule endoscopy to evaluate for underlying inflammatory bowel disease
Measure inflammatory markers (ESR, CRP) and serum protein electrophoresis
